select.isEqual: SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer JOIN tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerUseDep.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerID = tbContainerUseDep.ContainerID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainerUseDep.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #useDeptID# ORDER BY tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID

SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID , tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID FROM tbContainer JOIN tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerUseDep.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerID = tbContainerUseDep.ContainerID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainerUseDep.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID <> #myDeptID# ORDER BY tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID, tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID

sqlMap.select: SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer , tbContainerType WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID AND tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #myDeptID# ORDER BY tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID

SELECT TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode ,
TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname itemname
TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname itemname2
FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO JOIN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID JOIN tbContainer ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = tbContainer.tenant_id AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID = tbContainer.ContainerID JOIN TBDOCNUM_ITEM ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBDOCNUM_ITEM.tenant_id AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode = TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemcode WHERE TBENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DelFlag IS NULL AND ( TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode IS NOT NULL ) AND ( TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode <> '' ) AND ( TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID IN ( SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID FROM tbContainer LEFT JOIN tbContainerUseDep ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerUseDep.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerID = tbContainerUseDep.ContainerID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND ( tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #deptID# ) OR ( tbContainerUseDep.UseDepID = #deptID# ) ) )
GROUP BY TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode, TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname
GROUP BY TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode, TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname2
ORDER BY TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode
SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM TBCODELIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND CODE2 = #code2#
SELECT USERCONTID , USERCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNUSERID = #userID# ORDER BY USERCONTNAME
SELECT DEPTCONTID , DEPTCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION , SN , MANAGEUSERID FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNDEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY SN, DEPTCONTNAME
SELECT count(*) FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #userID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #deptContID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM TBCONTAINER INNER JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID AND TBCONTAINER.CONTAINERTYPEID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.CONTAINERTYPEID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DOCUMENTSTATE IN (#staDSPumYui#, #staDSBalSin#) AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM tbContainer JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON tbContainer.tenant_id = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #staDSBansong# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN
SELECT CODE, NAME1 AS NAME FROM TBCODEDOCTYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY CODE

SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainer.ContainerTypeID , tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 FROM tbContainer JOIN tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.companyid = tbContainerType.companyid AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND tbContainer.companyid = #companyID# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#
SELECT containerTypeName$primary$, containerTypeID FROM tbcontainertype WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(tbContainer.ContainerID) FROM tbContainer JOIN tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.companyid = tbContainerType.companyid AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainer.companyid = #companyID# AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = #codeID#
SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBLISTOPTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND LISTTYPE = #listCode# AND DTYPE IS NULL ORDER BY SN

SELECT CTDS.CONTAINERTYPEID, CTDS.DOCUMENTSTATE, CT.CONTAINERTYPENAME, CT.CONTAINERTYPENAME2, CDS.NAME1 AS DOCUMENTSTATENAME, CDS.CODE AS DOCUMENTCODE FROM TBCODEDOCSTATE CDS LEFT JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE CTDS ON CTDS.TENANT_ID = CDS.TENANT_ID AND CTDS.COMPANYID = CDS.COMPANYID AND CTDS.DOCUMENTSTATE = CDS.CODE LEFT JOIN TBCONTAINERTYPE CT ON CTDS.TENANT_ID = CT.TENANT_ID AND CTDS.COMPANYID = CT.COMPANYID AND CTDS.CONTAINERTYPEID = CT.CONTAINERTYPEID WHERE CDS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CDS.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CDS.ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY DOCUMENTSTATENAME
SELECT USEDEPID FROM tbContainerUseDep WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERID = #contID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN
SELECT containertypename$lang$ as containerTypeName FROM TBCONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #contType#
SELECT CODE2, NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY CODE2
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #deptID# AND CONTTYPE = #contType# AND SN = #sn#
SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(FORMID,';'), FORMNAME$lang$) AS FORMIDNAME FROM TBFORMINFO WHERE $subQuery$

select.isEmpty: SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME$lang$ as FORMCONTNAME , FORMCONTOWNDEPID , FORMCONTPARENTS , FORMCONTDESCRIPTION FROM TBFormContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTPARENTS = #id#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT fc.FormContID , fc.FormContName$lang$ as FormContName , fc.FormContOwnDepID , fc.FormContParents , fc.FormContdescription FROM TBFormContainer fc LEFT JOIN TBFormContUserGroup fcug ON fc.tenant_id = fcug.tenant_id AND fc.companyid = fcug.companyid AND fc.FormContID = fcug.FormContID WHERE fc.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND fc.companyid = #companyID# AND fc.FormContParents = #id# AND ( fc.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' OR fc.FormContOwnDepID = #deptID# OR fcug.FormContUserDepID = #deptID# )

select.isEmpty: SELECT COUNT(FORMCONTID) FROM TBFormContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTPARENTS = #id#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(fc.FormContID) FROM TBFormContainer fc LEFT JOIN TBFormContUserGroup fcug ON fc.tenant_id = fcug.tenant_id AND fc.companyid = fcug.companyid AND fc.FormContID = fcug.FormContID WHERE fc.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND fc.companyid = #companyID# AND fc.FormContParents = #id# AND ( fc.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' OR fc.FormContOwnDepID = #deptID# OR fcug.FormContUserDepID = #deptID# )

select.isEqual: SELECT formid, formDescription, formDocType, formFileLocation, formName, formName2 FROM TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID# AND ( CASE WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# = '1' THEN FORMNAME WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# != '1' THEN FORMNAME2 WHEN #searchType# = '1' THEN FORMDESCRIPTION ELSE FORMNAME END ) LIKE '%' || #searchName# || '%' ORDER BY FORMORDER

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT formid, formDescription, formDocType, formFileLocation, formName, formName2 FROM TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID# AND ( FORMDOCTYPE = 'A01001' OR FORMDOCTYPE = 'A01002' OR FORMDOCTYPE = 'A01003' ) AND ( CASE WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# = '1' THEN FORMNAME WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# != '1' THEN FORMNAME2 WHEN #searchType# = '1' THEN FORMDESCRIPTION ELSE FORMNAME END ) LIKE '%' || #searchName# || '%' ORDER BY FORMORDER
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT formid, formDescription, formDocType, formFileLocation, formName, formName2 FROM TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID# AND FORMDOCTYPE = #formKind# AND ( CASE WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# = '1' THEN FORMNAME WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# != '1' THEN FORMNAME2 WHEN #searchType# = '1' THEN FORMDESCRIPTION ELSE FORMNAME END ) LIKE '%' || #searchName# || '%' ORDER BY FORMORDER

sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN extensionattribute6 IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE extensionattribute6 END userSecurityCode FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
SELECT isuse FROM TBCODELIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND code1 = #code1# AND code2 = #code2#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID) FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBENDAPRLINEINFO ON A.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND A.DOCID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON A.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND A.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON A.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND A.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userID#
CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
CONTAINERID IN (#contID#)
( #userSecurityCode# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE OR ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DocID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END getIsLineInfo FROM TBENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DocID = A.DOCID AND AprMemberID = #userID# ) = 'Y')
#userSecurityCode# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (A.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR A.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (A.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userID# ))
$subQuery$
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ProcessYN FROM TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DocID = #docID# ORDER BY ProcessYN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.* , B.NAME1 AS DOCTYPENAME, C.NAME1 AS DOCSTATENAME, D.NAME1 AS FUNCTIONTYPENAME , GETSENDSTATUS(A.DOCID) AS SENDFLAG FROM ( $strSubQuery$ ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ROWNUM <= #querySizeSub#) A INNER JOIN TBCODEDOCTYPE B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCTYPE = B.CODE INNER JOIN TBCODEDOCSTATE C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.DOCSTATE = C.CODE INNER JOIN TBCODEAPRSTATE D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID AND A.FUNCTIONTYPE = D.CODE $orderByMain$ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #querySizeMain#

select.isEqual: SELECT mainid, subid, deptid, deptname$lang$ as deptname, addcompanyid FROM TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND MAINID = #groupID# ORDER BY SUBID

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT M.MAINID , M.MAINNAME FROM TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN M JOIN TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB S ON M.tenant_id = S.tenant_id AND M.companyid = S.companyid AND M.MAINID = S.MAINID WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyid# ORDER BY M.MAINID
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT mainid, mainname FROM TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY MAINID

sqlMap.select:
SELECT groupid, g_level, g_upperid, groupname, groupname2, etc FROM TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND G_LEVEL = #g_level#
g_upperid = #groupID#
ORDER BY GROUPID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND G_UPPERID = #groupID# ORDER BY GROUPID

SELECT groupid, itemcode, itemname, itemname2, itemlimit, itemsecurity, itempublic FROM TBDOCNUM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID# ORDER BY ITEMCODE
SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM TBCODELIST WHERE CODE1 = #code1# AND NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #code2#)
SELECT CASE WHEN LPAD(MAX(itemcode), 3, '0') IS NULL THEN '0000000001' ELSE LPAD(MAX(itemcode) + 1, 3, '0') END maxContID FROM TBDOCNUM_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(usercontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBUSERCONT ( USERCONTID, USERCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, DESCRIPTION, OWNUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #userContName#, #parentContID#, #description#, #userID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT NVL(MAX(deptcontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBDEPTCONT ( DEPTCONTID, DEPTCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, SN, DESCRIPTION, OWNDEPTID, MANAGEUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #deptContName#, #parentContID#, #sn#, #description#, #deptID#, #manageUserID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(CONTAINERTYPEID) IS NULL THEN '100' ELSE MAX(CONTAINERTYPEID) END maxID FROM tbContainerType WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
INSERT INTO tbContainerType ( CONTAINERTYPEID, CONTAINERTYPENAME, CONTAINERTYPENAME2, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxID# + 10, #docTypeName#, #docTypeName2#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN LPAD(MAX(CONTAINERID), 10, '0') IS NULL THEN '0000000001' ELSE LPAD(MAX(CONTAINERID) + 1, 10, '0') END maxContID FROM TBCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
INSERT INTO TBCONTAINER ( ContainerID, ContainerTypeID, ContainerOwnDepID, companyid, tenant_id ) VALUES ( #maxContID#, #contType#, #contOwnDeptID#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SN) + 1 END SN FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #deptID# AND CONTTYPE = #contType#
INSERT INTO TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO ( DeptID, ContType, SN, contName, subquery, companyid, tenant_id ) VALUES ( #deptID#, #contType#, #sn#, #contName#, #subQuery#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(groupid) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(groupid) + 1 END groupid FROM TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
INSERT INTO TBDOCNUM_GROUP ( GROUPID, G_LEVEL, G_UPPERID, GROUPNAME, GROUPNAME2, ETC, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #groupID#, #g_level#, #g_upperID#, #groupName#, #groupName2#, NULL, #companyID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBCONTAINER SET ContainerTypeID = #contType#, ContainerOwnDepID = #contOwnDeptID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ContainerID = #contID#
UPDATE TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO SET SN = '0' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND ContType = #contType# AND SN = #sn#
UPDATE TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO SET SN = #sn# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND ContType = #contType2# AND SN = #sn2#
UPDATE TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO SET SN = #sn2# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND ContType = #contType# AND SN = '0'

UPDATE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET OrgContID = #sourceContID# WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID IN ( SELECT DocID From TBENDAPRDOCINFO A WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.ContainerID = #sourceContID# )
UPDATE TBENDAPRDOCINFO SET ContainerID = #targetContID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #sourceContID#
UPDATE TBENDAPRDOCINFO SET ContainerID = #targetContID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #sourceContID# AND docID IN ( $subQuery$ )
UPDATE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET OrgContID = #sourceContID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid IN ( $subQuery$ )

UPDATE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET DelFlag = 'Y' WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID IN ( SELECT docid FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #contID#
AND enddate >= #startDate# AND enddate <= #endDate#
) AND delflag IS NULL
storageperiod = #storagePeriod#
UPDATE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET delflag = 'Y' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid IN ( $subQuery$ )
UPDATE TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN SET MAINNAME = #groupName# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND MAINID = #groupID#
UPDATE TBDOCNUM_GROUP SET GROUPNAME = #groupName#, GROUPNAME2 = #groupName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID#

UPDATE TBDOCNUM_ITEM SET ITEMNAME = #itemName#, ITEMNAME2 = #itemName2#, ITEMLIMIT = #itemLimit#, ITEMSECURITY = #itemSecurity#, ITEMPUBLIC = #itemPublic# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID# AND ITEMCODE = #itemCode#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERTYPEID = #codeID#
DELETE FROM tbContainerType WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERTYPEID = #codeID#
DELETE FROM TBContainerToDocState WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DocumentState IN ($delString$)
DELETE FROM tbContainerUseDep WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ContainerID = #contID#
DELETE FROM tbContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERID = #contID#
DELETE FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND contType = #contType# AND sn = #sn#
DELETE TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND MAINID = #groupID#
DELETE TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND SUBID = #groupID#
DELETE TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID#
DELETE TBDOCNUM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID# AND ITEMCODE = #itemCode#
